name: Wild Zucchini Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Wild rice; dry, mixed with
1 Tomato; cut in wedges or chunks
1 Red bell pepper; or yellow or purple; cut in strips
1/2 cup Spinach; or less; torn small
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the dry rices. Soak the wild rice in 1/2 cup water for 2-4 hours.
Then cook it in 1/2 cup water for 15-20 minutes and add the brown rice,
cooking together for 45-60 minutes longer. Add extra water if necessary.
The rices will make 1 cup cooked. Cool or chill.
2. Mix all the ingredients together and toss with a favorite dressing.
3. This makes a great main dish for two or a side dish for four.
